issue_title: Converting file.mp4 to h265 results in a file.h265 file instead of .mkv
issue_body_preview:
![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e7656c67-d33b-44d8-9ac4-398fbba83fcd)

To me this feels counter-intuitive, and it's a bit of an annoyance explaining to people that you have to rename the files to .mkv or .mp4, then explain the difference, then explain further and so on.
test_description_zh: 上传一个 MP4 视频文件，选择将其转换为 H265 编码格式，执行转换后观察输出文件的文件扩展名。
expected_result_zh: 转换完成后，输出文件的扩展名应为常见的视频容器格式（如 .mkv 或 .mp4），而不是编码格式的原始扩展名 .h265。
